title: Check-in API tests skipped (missing env vars)
failing_expectation: Badge check-in tests require SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY and TEST_USER_ID to be set
evidence_snippet: Skipping API checkin test: Missing required env vars. Required: SUPABASE_URL (or NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL), SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY, TEST_USER_ID
notes: These tests were intentionally skipped due to missing integration credentials. To enable, provide the required env vars or use mocked endpoints.
